name: Backend API Main Application
description: FastAPI application entry point for centaur.tools API. Orchestrates router composition for auth, feed, forum, notifications, provenance, registry, search, users, and voting modules. Configures global dependency overrides for cookie-based authentication. Provides health check endpoint.

functions.name: health
functions.description: Health check endpoint that returns a static success status. Always returns {"status": "ok"} with no validation or actual system health checks.
postconditions: Returns dictionary with single key 'status' having value 'ok'

invariants: FastAPI app instance is configured with title='centaur.tools API'
dependency_overrides maps placeholder_get_current_user to real_get_current_user for cookie-based auth
Nine routers are registered: auth, feed, users, registry, search, voting, provenance, forum, notifications (in that order)

data_access.rationale: This module is the application composition layer. No direct data access occurs; all data operations are delegated to included routers.

side_effects.rationale: Initializes FastAPI app and registers routers during module import

authority.rationale: Owns the top-level application composition and global configuration. Delegates domain authority to specialized routers.
